calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Susan Parkinson, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Andrew Lambert, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Helen Keyes.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on November 12, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Andrew Lambert, and against defendant Helen Keyes as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $525.00.
Holdover Damages - $825.00.
Total - $1,350.00.

Additionally, plaintiff Andrew Lambert is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 706, Kearny Street, #112, San Francisco, CA 94108. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk F. Green/ N. Bautista; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Susan Parkinson, Esq. for Plaintiff Andrew Lambert.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there are no appearances by the defendant.
The trial date of Nov. 30, 2009 remains on calendar.
TRIAL DATE REMAINS.
